name: Penne with Pumpkin Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound penne or other tubular pasta
Freshly grated Parmesan as an accompaniment
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the onion, bell pepper, and garlic in butter over moderate heat, stirring until the vegetables are softened.
2. Stir in the pumpkin, broth, water, cream, nutmeg, salt, and pepper. Simmer the sauce, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
3. While the sauce is simmering, boil the penne in a kettle of salted boiling water until it is al dente. Reserve about 1 cup of the cooking water, then drain the pasta well.
4. Add the penne to the sauce and cook over moderate heat, stirring and thinning the sauce with some reserved cooking water as desired, for 1 to 2 minutes, or until the pasta is coated well. Stir in the parsley.
5. Divide the pasta between 2 plates and serve with Parmesan.
